title: The Minimalist Entrepreneur
author: Sahil Lavingia
description: How great founders do more with less. 9 practical frameworks as Claude Code skills to help you build a profitable, sustainable business starting from community.
longDescription: The Minimalist Entrepreneur is the definitive playbook for building a business that isn't about funding rounds, growth hacking, or world domination — it's about profitability, community, and doing more with less. Each chapter has been converted into an interactive Claude Code skill that guides you through the framework with personalized advice.
installCommand: git clone https://github.com/slavingia/skills.git ~/.claude/plugins/skills && claude plugin install ~/.claude/plugins/skills
